code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut has = false
  mut max_val = 0
  mut cur = ""
  mut in_tok = false
  while i <= n
    let is_end = i == n
    mut is_ws = true
    if not is_end
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      else
        is_ws = false
      end
    end
    if is_end or is_ws
      if in_tok
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            if not has
              max_val = v
              has = true
            else if v > max_val
              max_val = v
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
        in_tok = false
      end
    else
      let bb = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(bb)}"
      in_tok = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    println("max=#{max_val}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
end
